title: Record: 11L Value Residual + Gated Attention + AdamW TTT (val_bpb=1.0891)
body:
## Summary

**val_bpb = 1.0891** (sliding window stride=64, seed 1337) | **14.2 MB** artifact | 8xH100 SXM, 600s

First validation of Value Residual (ResFormer) + Gated Attention on the full competitive stack with AdamW TTT.

## Approach

Two architecture additions on top of the PR #442 recipe:

- **Value Residual**: Learned 2-element lambda blends first-block V into subsequent blocks. Block 0 passes V through (no lambda). +2 params/layer.
- **Gated Attention**: Per-head sigmoid gate on attention output. Init bias=4.0 (near-open). +4104 params/layer.

Both ablated in PR #413 (-0.017 bpb combined) but never tested with AdamW TTT + EMA.

## Results (seed 1337, 8xH100 SXM)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Training steps | 6,021 |
| Step time | 99.66 ms |
| Pre-quant val_bpb | 1.1545 |
| **Sliding window val_bpb** | **1.0891** |
| Artifact | 14,195,825 bytes |

## vs. Prior SOTA

| Submission | Best BPB | Mean BPB | Steps |
|-----------|----------|----------|-------|
| **Ours** | **1.0891** | pending (1 seed) | 6,021 |
| PR #442 (sjp611) | 1.0992 | 1.1027 | 4,612 |
| PR #481 (mrdavtan) | 1.0959 | 1.0970 | 7,101 |

Additional seeds pending compute credits.

## Run command

```bash
torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=8 train_gpt.py
```

All hyperparameters set as defaults in train_gpt.py.

## Credits

- PR #442 (sjp611): AdamW TTT
- PR #398 (felipe-parodi): EMA, TTT findings
- PR #413: VR + GA ablation
- PR #315 (jfprincz): Foundation architecture
